title: MicroOptimizations
body: # This mod currently causes issues!! Since 1.8 is dead these will not be fixed! # MicroOptimizations FeatherClient has made some of their optimizations public at [FeatherOpt](https://github.com/FeatherMC/FeatherOpt). I ported the optimizations that do not already exist in other Forge 1.8.9 optimization mods here to work on regular Forge. These optimizations are mostly cache and block pos pooling improvements. For further optimizations, I recommend using [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/download?f=preview_OptiFine_1.8.9_HD_U_M6_pre2.jar), [PolyPatcher](https://modrinth.com/mod/patcher), [Redirector](https://github.com/MCTeamPotato/Redirector/releases/download/1.4-1.12.2-1.8.8/redirectionor-1.4.for.1.12.2-1.8.8.jar), and [Velox Caelo](https://modrinth.com/mod/veloxcaelo). ## Modpack? You may use this mod as the license permits.
